name: Air Liquide S.A.
h1: Air Liquide's GCC footprint in India
lede: Air Liquide runs two centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and New Delhi, covering GCC/GIC and engineering & design, built over 34 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Air Liquide office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Air Liquide S.A. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Air Liquide runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, New Delhi), covering GCC/GIC and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

Head of Human Resources, Air Liquide India

about.description: Air Liquide's India footprint covers Mumbai and New Delhi, spanning GCC/GIC and engineering & design. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D, HR, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seventeen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Air Liquide operate in India?
faq.a: Air Liquide operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Air Liquide have centers in?
faq.a: Air Liquide's India footprint includes Mumbai and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Air Liquide run in India?
faq.a: Air Liquide runs GCC/GIC and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Air Liquide's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Air Liquide's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Air Liquide's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Air Liquide's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
